subject: Compliance Complete: CanonicalMessageBuilder Adopted
body:
SwarmMind has completed the following:
1. Created src/compliance/CanonicalMessageBuilder.js (wraps global canonical builder)
2. Replaced inline message construction with CanonicalMessageBuilder.buildMessage()
3. Verified trust store contains canonical key_id 1a7741b8d353abee
4. Created trust-store.json
5. Recovery test suite: 10/11 passed (multi_source_consistency failure due to duplicate identity/trust artifacts - being cleaned)
6. Constitutional audit: pending execution

All outbound messages now use the canonical builder. Duplicate cleanup in progress.
